channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Async Python traps: sync vs trio vs asyncio 2026
item.description: Cut async Python surprises 70% by choosing trio over asyncio — memory leaks, cancellation storms, and debugger traps exposed with Python 3.11 benchmarks.

item.title: AI rollouts live or die by flags
item.description: Reduce AI incident minutes 40% with feature flags in 2026 — 15 ms p95 latency, GDPR-ready audit trails, and $3/month DynamoDB costs using Node 20 LTS and AWS Lambda arm64.

item.title: 9 tests to chase AI bugs without testing AI
item.description: Cut test maintenance 50% with 9 concrete techniques that test behavior, not AI output. From OpenAPI contracts to property-based tests — here’s what actually works in 2026.

item.title: 5 patterns to keep systems up when consistency breaks
item.description: Cut API failure 99.9% with 5 outage-proof patterns — outbox, saga, CRDTs, event sourcing, and versioned cache. Benchmarked at 120k orders/minute with DynamoDB Global Tables and Redis 7.2.

item.title: Lose the .env files: what replaced them in 2026
item.description: Cut secrets leak risk 99% in 2026 with runtime-zeroed secrets — AWS Lambda Extensions, Vault 1.17, and SOPS workarounds for teams still stuck on .env files.

item.title: Istio 1.22 flopped. Cilium 1.15 won.
item.description: Cut production latency 40% and cluster costs 30% by choosing Cilium or Linkerd instead of Istio 1.22 in 2026. Real benchmarks, memory figures, and rollback stories from six production clusters.

item.title: 3 AI coders ranked: Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code in
item.description: Cut edit latency 40% with Windsurf 2026.3.1 — real latency, cost, and PII audit numbers for Cursor, Windsurf, and Claude Code in daily use.

item.title: Cost hacking multi-region backends in 2026
item.description: Your fraud detection model needs writes in one region, but 90% of reads happen in another.

item.title: 3 second incomes for devs in 2026 — no SaaS needed
item.description: Earn KES 22k/month in 2026 with a 200-line API wrapper — no SaaS, no sales, and no waiting. Real Nairobi case studies, code, and launch checklist.

item.title: Stop shipping daily: the burn rate math
item.description: Cut daily posting burn 70% with deliberate artifacts — READMEs, GIFs, and issue templates that actually convert. Real metrics and tools for 2026 builders.

item.title: Ship 1MB pages on 4G: Starlink Africa case study
item.description: Ship 1MB pages under 1.5s on 4G in 2026 after Starlink beams hit East Africa — Brotli, CDN edge rules, and QUIC steps with Node 20 LTS and CloudFront 2026 pricing.

item.title: Passkeys killed passwords in 2026
item.description: Cut failed logins 82% by switching to passkeys — real numbers, code samples, and the Samsung credential ID trap we hit first.

item.title: Cut false positives 85% with this CI security trick
item.description: Cut false positives 85% in CI security scans with policy-as-code — SonarQube 10.5, Snyk 1.1400, Trivy 0.48, GitHub Actions cost dropped 74% to $2,100/month

item.title: Claude Code after 365 days: what actually works
item.description: See 38% faster PR merges and 50% fewer on-call pages using Claude Code in 2026 — real latency, cost, and coverage numbers from 14 repos.

item.title: APIs must die in 2026
item.description: Cut API failure rates 85% by ditching REST in 2026 — idempotency keys, HTTP/3, and callback queues that survive 250 ms latency and 15% packet loss.

item.title: Automate 80% keep 20%: why AI agents still need humans
item.description: Reduce AI agent errors 6x by measuring human-in-the-loop patterns: Option A cuts reversals to 0.04% but costs $7,865/month; Option B saves 4.4x on wages but risks $2,400 in chargebacks.

item.title: Reconciling mobile money: edge cases banks ignore
item.description: The mismatches weren’t large dollar amounts—they were 1 Naira here, 5 Naira there—but they accumulated into a $4,200 variance over a single weekend.

item.title: Drop checklists: AI code reviews that scale
item.description: Cut code review time 65% by replacing static checklists with AI agents that replay production events — concrete GitHub Action + Lambda setup and real failure caught, 2026 benchmarks.

item.title: Which AI wrappers made money in 2026
item.description: Cut AI wrapper failure 65% in 2026 with the 3 wrappers that survived rigorous production testing and cost audits.

item.title: Debug AI agent failures: 4 mistakes most teams miss
item.description: Cut AI agent failures 45% faster by adding prompt diffs, tool-use traces, and reward scores — the 3 artifacts most teams miss in 2026 postmortems.
